name: Node.js

startup: print_status() { echo -e "\n\e[1;36m[YuraCloud]\e[0m \e[33m$1...\e[0m"; }; export PORT=${SERVER_PORT}; export PATH="/home/container/.local/bin:$PATH"; npm config set prefix /home/container/.local --global 2>/dev/null || npm config set prefix /home/container/.local; npm config set cache /home/container/.npm-cache --global 2>/dev/null || npm config set cache /home/container/.npm-cache; if [ -d .git ] && [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then print_status "Menarik pembaruan kode dari GitHub"; git pull; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then print_status "Menginstal dependensi produksi"; npm install --production --no-audit --no-fund; fi; export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=$(($SERVER_MEMORY - 64)) --use-openssl-ca"; print_status "Menjalankan aplikasi"; exec ${CMD_RUN}
